intended_use: EchoSolv AS is a machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI)-based decision support software indicated for use as an adjunct to echocardiography for assessment of severe aortic stenosis (AS
intended_use_full: EchoSolv AS is a machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI)-based decision support software indicated for use as an adjunct to echocardiography for assessment of severe aortic stenosis (AS). When utilized by an interpreting physician, this device provides information to facilitate rendering an accurate diagnosis of AS.
ground_truth: Assessment of presence or absence of severe aortic stenosis (AVA≤1 cm²) by US board certified cardiologists who reviewed and verified echocardiographic data and hemodynamic profile, blinded to device output
other_metrics: Diagnostic likelihood ratios at low/medium/high probability outputs: 0.067 (95%CI: 0.057-0.080), 0.935 (95%CI: 0.829-1.05), and 10.3 (95%CI: 9.22-11.50) respectively. Clinical MRMC unassisted AUROC 0.865 (95%CI: 0.837-0.893), assisted AUROC 0.883 (95%CI: 0.857-0.909), mean improvement 0.018±0.010 (p=0.064). Reader concordance improved from Kappa 0.641 to 0.667 with device assistance.
